narrative:
Piqua City has 12,461 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.8 percentage points.
